name: Wilde
description: Wilde, a wily ranger. They are highly dexterous and nimble, and are well suited to acrobatic maneuvers. They only have a very limited use of magic, able to use only the simplest nature spells and none else. While they are nimble they aren't frail, and can hold their own in one-on-one combat. They have 15 hit points total. They start with light leather armor, a bow, arrows, and a small dagger in their boot.
blurb: Wilde - a nature-loving ranger. They are acrobatic and nimble, and can cast simple nature spells to coax plants and animals to aid them.

SkillNameExample1.name: Acrobatics
SkillNameExample1.description: Move like the wind, nimbly and swiftly

modifier.modify: Enemies are less likely to hear your movements, and you move faster in all environments.

SkillNameExample2.name: Powershot
SkillNameExample2.description: Channel energy into your bow, empowering its next shot

modifier.trigger: active skill: ask player to use it by your judgement
modifier.modify: The next arrow fired from your bow deals triple damage, at the cost of mana.

ItemNameExample1.name: Ranger's Bow
ItemNameExample1.description: Your trusty bow. Sleek, black, and deadly.

ItemNameExample2.name: Knife
ItemNameExample2.description: The knife you keep stashed in your boot. Light and designed for stabbing.
